rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendant 112 Hyde St Llcs Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens; Or, In The Alternative, For Posting Of Bond; And For An Award Of Reasonable Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday February 28, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT 112 HYDE ST LLC Notice Of Defendant 112 Hyde St Llcs Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens; Or, In The Alternative, For Posting Of Bond; And For An Award Of Reasonable Attorneys Fees continued to March 15, 2018. rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION , AS TRUSTEE, VS. LINDA CATRON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Authoizing Substitution Of Real Party In Interest For Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday February 28, 2016, line 8. REAL PARTY IN INTEREST 2614 SACRAMENTO STREET, LLC MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Authoizing Substitution Of Real Party In Interest For Plaintiff GRANTED. 2614 Sacramento Street, LLC shall be substituted in as Plaintiff. 2614 Sacramento, LLC's right to enforce the judgment for possession and/or money is not properly before this Court at this time. See Notice of Motion. = (501/ACM)
